name: Pretty Agent
short_description: Urgent mission! According to reliable intelligence, the female drug Lord Miss S is hiding in the city's X hotel. In order to avoid causing unnecessary panic, please play as female agent 33 to the destination to execute secret arrest!
detailed_description:
This is an action role-playing game, players need to play an extraordinary beauty agent, through stealth, camouflage, assassination, fighting, kidnapping and other means to secretly arrest the target. The game design is very open, each level has a variety of ways to complete the task to be discovered by players, such as you can blend in, you can also quietly sneak behind people, of course, you can also be a master of accidental manufacturing, or secretly cast poison...
· Sexy and beautiful female protagonists.
· Finely crafted various characters.
· Real, rich and vast scenes.
· Brain-burning fun game strategies.
· 3D model.
· Third person perspective.
